name: store-ops-cloud
description: Cloudflare-native autonomous ASO agent (store-ops). Workers + D1 + Cron + Pages.

scripts.deploy:dashboard: npm run build:dashboard && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name store-ops-dashboard
scripts.build:web: npm --prefix web ci && VITE_API_BASE="${VITE_API_BASE:-https://api.shipaso.com}" npm --prefix web run build
scripts.build:combined: npm run build:dashboard && npm run build:web && node scripts/web-enable.mjs
scripts.deploy:web-preview: npm run build:combined && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name store-ops-web-preview --branch main
